name: 18-chalkboard-menu.jpg

info.description: This image depicts a mannequin dressed in a vintage suit standing next to a table and chairs outside a brick building. A chalkboard sign advertising "Deli Specials" is mounted on the brick wall, and the scene appears to be a nostalgic or themed outdoor setting. The overall aesthetic is slightly retro and charming.
info.text:
